purpose: Project Shadow1 (tech leap 3) — declares every scored historical corpus, its class, its shipped engine-flag config, and its invariants. shadow_backtest.py consumes this. Flags are seeded from the authoritative batch runners per category; baseline and diff always run a corpus under identical flags, so the backtest detects ENGINE-CODE diffs.

corpora.name: milk
corpora.note: FROZEN INVARIANT (CNO 2026-05-30): scores = run_005_headpin, engine-baseline-2026-06-04. Headpin runner sets no flags -> engine defaults. Any shadow movement here is a frozen-invariant breach.

corpora.name: snack_bars

invariants.why: Frozen invariant: no snack bar reaches A; snk-001 = 70/B is the validated category ceiling.

corpora.note: FROZEN: run_snackbars_007_headpin config — BARI_RECAL_P0=off, W4=on (engine defaults).

corpora.name: yogurt
corpora.note: run_yogurt_006 ship config (batch_run_yogurt_006.py, TASK-249 remediated corpus). Pre-go-live candidate.

corpora.name: yogurt_yohananof
corpora.note: Yohananof yogurt expansion; runner sets no flags itself — seeded with the yogurt category ship config (pre-TASK250).

corpora.name: cereals
corpora.note: run_cereals_008 live config (batch_run_cereals_008.py: BARI_RECAL_P0=on). TASK-189 sodium flag (BARI_SODIUM_CEREAL) NOT shipped — stays off.

corpora.name: cereals_multiretailer
corpora.note: Multi-retailer cereals promote set; same engine config as cereals_008.

corpora.name: cheese_yohananof
corpora.note: Yohananof cheese expansion; seeded with the cheese category config.

corpora.name: hummus
corpora.note: Canonical hummus corpus (run_hummus_002 lineage). batch_run_hummus_003.py: BARI_RECAL_P0=on.

corpora.name: hard_cheeses
corpora.note: batch_run_hard_cheeses_001.py: BARI_RECAL_P0=on, TASK144=off. The red-label experimental config (BARI_REDLABEL_V1=on + BARI_DAIRY_SAT_FAT_INFER=on, TASK-REDLABEL-001) is NOT the registered config until it ships.

deferred.name: bread_retail_003
deferred.reason: Bespoke loader (frozen provenance real_bread_retail_003_v1; curated 31-product set built by build_curated_003.py, not load_batch-compatible). Add via custom loader in Shadow v2.

deferred.name: butter
deferred.reason: Single merged JSON (02_products/butter/bsip1_outputs/butter_bsip1_merged.json), not a load_batch dir. Add via custom loader in Shadow v2.

deferred.name: salty_snacks
deferred.reason: Bespoke BSIP1 enrichment path (enrich_salty_snacks_bsip1.py); corpus rebuild in flight (TASK-228). Register once the real corpus lands.

deferred.name: bread_light
deferred.reason: Synthesis-calibration corpus, not a real retail shelf — out of backtest scope.

deferred.name: frozen_vegetables
deferred.reason: Score-free category by design (TASK-235) — no A–E scores to backtest.
